name: Wall of Frost
description:
Slam your staff down to create an icy barrier in front of you, dealing 280 Frost Damage to enemies in the target area every 1 second and applying Frost Shield for 6 seconds to you and nearby allies that absorbs up to 4132 damage from projectiles.

Chilled enemies are afflicted with Minor Breach and their Movement Speed is reduced by 40% for 4 seconds.
